title: Z Coder
description: Created a collaborative coding platform featuring personalized user profiles, bookmarking of coding problems and interactive commenting to enhance learning and engagement. Integrated real-time code editor using Judge0 API, interactive rooms for user collaboration, and a comprehensive calendar to track coding contests. User authentication with secure user/password login and data storage using Mongoose. Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, ReactJS, NodeJS, ExpressJS, MongoDB and WebSocket.

title: Airline management
description: Developed a comprehensive flight search and booking system, enabling users to find flights based on destination, travel dates, and preferences, with real-time updates on availability and pricing. Implemented user authentication and authorization feature using PassportJS, including email/password login and signup, ensuring secure access to ticket booking and cancellation functionalities. Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, NodeJS, ExpressJS, PassportJS and MongoDB.

title: Finance Manager
description: Developed a finance manager system which has Categories for transactions, User management with multiple users, Command-line interface for interaction, Enhanced file handling with JSON format. Tech Stack: C++(OOPS) , JSON and STL(as libraries).
